title: App-context app (per-record frontmatter)
description: Frontmatter of app-context/src/apps/<slug>.md. Describes an Actian application's identity, header variant, navigation structure, and behavioural signals.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier for the app; used as the filename (minus .md) and cross-reference target.

label.description: Human-readable display name of the app shown in navigation and documentation.

header.description: Global-header configuration for the app; controls the DS header variant rendered at runtime.

type.description: Header variant; matches the DS global-header App type axis.

sidebar.description: Ordered list of primary navigation items shown in the app sidebar.

label.description: Display text for the sidebar navigation item.

id.description: Stable identifier for the sidebar item; used for deep-linking and analytics.
